rows.title: When the Line Broke
rows.characters: Rowan Vale, Elias Vale, Mara Sable, Naia Thorn, Derren Holt, Benn, Lio, guild clerk, three trapped workers, Toma
rows.events: Rowan defies his father, joins an unofficial rescue into South Third, frees Lio, survives a collapse, and becomes trapped below with workers as shardmice mass and a deep bell rings from forbidden depth.
rows.stateChanges: Rowan moves from debt-pressured runner near home to trapped survival leader below the mine with damaged gear, no surface route, and a possible path into old depths.
rows.hookActivity: H01 advanced; H05 advanced; H02 mentioned

rows.title: The Hollow Behind Stone
rows.characters: Rowan Vale, Lio, Mett, Toma, Sena, Jeren, Benn, Derren
rows.events: Rowan locates and opens a patched false wall, leads the trapped survivors through a hidden unstable bypass into an abandoned service corridor, and helps rescue a pinned survivor named Jeren before receiving a blue notice that recognizes his actions and names his trait.
rows.stateChanges: The group escapes the collapse pocket into unmapped old workings, Toma is confirmed alive, Benn and Derren remain missing, Jeren joins the survivor cluster badly injured, and Rowan gains first explicit system-facing recognition.
rows.hookActivity: H02 advanced; H01 advanced; survival-determine-toma-fate-and advanced; survival-mystery-discover-what-lies advanced; H03 advanced; H05 mentioned

rows.title: Paper Shields
rows.characters: Rowan Vale, Lio, Mett, Sena, Toma, Jeren, Joren Pike, guild registrar, gray clerk, watchmen, medics, ore-hauler woman, workers
rows.events: Rowan leads the injured survivors back through the old service corridor to a side storage cut, emerges into the sorting yard, refuses to surrender route details to guild officials and Joren Pike, receives a new Ledger notice retaining his provisional recognition, and learns from Lio about provisional qualification screens as the first path to legal standing.
rows.stateChanges: Group exits immediate underground trap; Jeren and Toma are transferred to medics; Rowan’s conflict shifts from physical survival to legal-economic struggle; he adopts a concrete new objective: qualify, get papers, and secure claim rights before Pike acts.
rows.hookActivity: H01 advanced; H02 advanced; H03 advanced; H05 advanced; economic-mystery-determine-whether-the advanced; H08 opened; H09 opened

rows.title: The Price of Being Counted
rows.characters: Rowan Vale, Lio Marr, Toma, Jeren, Sena, Mett (off-scene), Hadrik, registry runner, Benn’s sister, Mistress Corl, Elias Vale, medics, registrar/orderly
rows.events: Rowan wakes in the healing ward, learns the true cost and structure of the provisional screen, is pressured by Hadrik for route details and threatened with review consequences, recruits Sena as a truth-telling witness, fails to reach Jeren, confronts Benn’s family directly, and is summoned inside by his father ahead of the afternoon board.
rows.stateChanges: Rowan moves from broad strategic intent to same-day procedural urgency; fee/bond barriers become concrete; Sena becomes a committed witness; Jeren and Toma are unavailable; Benn’s kin become active participants; Elias enters the on-page conflict.
rows.hookActivity: H01 advanced; H02 mentioned/advanced through bell-memory tie; H03 advanced; H04 advanced; H05 advanced; H08 advanced; H09 advanced; H10 opened; H11 opened

rows.title: Second Bell, Closed Doors
rows.characters: Rowan Vale, Elias Vale, Lio Marr, Sena, Joren Pike, Registrar Heth, Boardwoman Nare, Mistress Corl, Benn’s sister, Pike’s advocate, hall runner, guards, petitioners
rows.events: Rowan and Elias argue over how to survive the hearing; Lio and Sena arrive and accompany Rowan to the hall; the board hears Pike’s accusations and Rowan’s defense; Sena, Lio, and Elias testify; Rowan secures a preliminary ruling retaining his notice, keeping Benn and Derren’s file open, and limiting disclosure to a future sealed deposition; Pike is denied observer rights; a final runner report reveals fresh subsidence and search markers disturbed from inside South Third.
rows.stateChanges: Rowan’s provisional notice is officially retained; no unlawful-withholding finding is made; missing-party status stays open for Benn Arl and Derren Holt; a sealed technical deposition becomes the next procedural step; Elias shifts into active if strained support; Pike is temporarily checked; a new underground anomaly escalates urgency.
rows.hookActivity: H01 advanced; H02 advanced; H03 advanced; H04 advanced; H05 advanced; H08 advanced; H09 advanced; H10 resolved; H11 advanced; H12 opened
rows.mood: Tense, adversarial, grimly vindicating, then ominous

rows.title: Where the Marks Were Moved
rows.characters: Rowan Vale, Lio Marr, Sena, Darm Pell, Sern, Nessa, unnamed hall review authority voice, guild hands, watchmen, runner
rows.events: After leaving the hearing, Rowan sends Sena to warn Benn’s sister about hazard-closure costs, visits the new South Third cordon with Lio, learns the posted facts about displaced and broken search markers, wins covert help from district measurer Darm Pell, gains restricted access to maintenance abstracts in the archive annex, discovers records of a sealed secondary bell conduit and deferred reinforcement at the old service seam, connects “dead resonance” to the hidden wall, and ends with hall review authority arriving as Nessa reveals someone aboveground is already searching the records.
rows.stateChanges: Location shifts from hearing hall steps to market streets, South Third cordon, then archive lower room; Rowan gains documentary clues and two cautious institutional contacts; Lio learns Rowan withheld the “older workmanship” detail; Sena splits off on a protective errand; the conflict becomes a live records race.
rows.hookActivity: H01 advanced; H02 strongly advanced; H04 advanced; H05 advanced; H08 advanced; H09 advanced; H12 advanced; H13 opened; H14 opened

rows.title: Names Kept Off the Slip
rows.characters: Rowan Vale, Nessa Vale, Lio Marr, Overseer Talren, young runner
rows.events: Talren interrogates Rowan in the archive, reveals Pike-side procedural escalation and Review's competing interest, extracts partial information about the older structure, and the chapter ends with fresh soundings reporting two returns as Rowan and Lio head for South Third while Nessa stays to trace the records.
rows.stateChanges: Rowan refuses Review full control, Nessa keeps the copied transfer note, the alliance splits into archive-tracing and field-listening tasks, and Pike's race for control becomes overt both on paper and on the street.
rows.hookActivity: H01 advanced; H02 advanced; H04 advanced; H09 advanced; H12 advanced; H13 advanced; H14 advanced

rows.title: The Echo That Answered Back
rows.characters: Rowan Vale, Lio Marr, Darm Pell, Bren, Mara Arl, clerk, runner, laborers, watchmen, Pike-side plainclothes contractors
rows.events: Rowan and Lio reach the South Third cordon, confront Pell and Pike contractor Bren over the two returns, Rowan warns Pell to shift the strike east, confirms by listening that the near answer is faced built stone with a deeper second response, recruits Mara Arl to watch outgoing packets, and the adjusted strike opens a crack venting cold air from below. Pell then suspends simplified strike notes, records an obstruction/secondary void, and receives Nessa’s archive message identifying the site as a transferred bell foundation with sealed interior access before a second knock answers from beneath the street.
rows.stateChanges: Rowan’s injuries worsen slightly from strain; Pell shifts from wary helper to active procedural resistor; Mara becomes a field watcher; the official simple-collapse narrative is disrupted; South Third’s hidden structure is reclassified from suspected conduit to transferred bell foundation; the site itself physically opens.
rows.hookActivity: H01 advanced; H02 strongly advanced; H04 strongly advanced; H05 advanced; H08 advanced; H09 advanced; H12 strongly advanced; H13 strongly advanced; H14 advanced; H15 opened
rows.chapterType: Field Investigation / Procedural Confrontation / Discovery / Cliffhanger

rows.title: What Moved Below
rows.characters: Rowan Vale, Lio Marr, Darm Pell, Bren, Mara Arl, Maelin, two district clerks, runner, watchmen, crowd, Hadrik, Review personnel
rows.events: At the open South Third fissure, Rowan and Pell fend off Bren’s attempt to control reporting; district official Maelin arrives; Rowan listens through the crack and identifies irregular movement below, then demonstrates interrupted airflow consistent with passage near the vent and argues the disturbed markers were badly reset by different hands. Maelin seals the lane, blocks backfill and contractor descent, routes future disclosures through Pell, privately warns Rowan, and the chapter ends with Hadrik and Review arriving as something faintly answers again from below.
rows.stateChanges: South Third becomes a formally barricaded restricted hazard; the simple-collapse narrative is blocked at district level; possible subsurface movement enters the official restricted record; Rowan’s injuries worsen; suspicion rises that Rowan knows of another entrance; Maelin enters as a new authority node; Review pressure becomes immediate and on-site.
rows.hookActivity: H01 advanced; H02 strongly advanced; H03 advanced; H04 strongly advanced; H05 strongly advanced; H09 strongly advanced; H11 advanced; H12 strongly advanced; H13 advanced; H14 strongly advanced; H15 strongly advanced; H16 opened; H17 opened
rows.chapterType: Procedural Confrontation / Mystery Escalation / Site Lockdown / Cliffhanger
